dataset: Natural Earth and World Bank Indicators

pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup_task.sh creating the export directory, export_result.sh explicitly checks for this path.
setup_task.sh generates the CSV file with these exact column headers.
Extracted from the CSV generated in setup_task.sh. The USA row has CO2_PC=13.68, and the CHN row has LIFE_EXP=77.10. Verified using script analysis.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires joining a dynamically generated CSV (containing real 2020 World Bank data) to a pre-existing Natural Earth shapefile. The shapefile must be exported to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/countries_with_indicators.shp'. The final joined data must contain the indicators from the CSV, including 'CO2_PC', 'LIFE_EXP', and 'INTERNET_PCT'. Analysis of the base CSV confirmed that USA has a CO2 per capita of 13.68, and China has a life expectancy of 77.10. Both countries exist in the base shapefile under the 'ISO_A3' attribute.
